headline: Caning of women introduced in Terengganu syariah amendment
context: Terengganu's 2024 syariah criminal procedure amendment introduced caning as a punishment for Muslim women convicted of specific moral offences.

cards.big: Terengganu introduces caning for Muslim women under 2024 syariah amendment
cards.sub: First state to extend syariah corporal punishment to women explicitly

cards.big: Federal Penal Code Section 289 exempts women from judicial whipping entirely
cards.sub: State syariah law diverges from federal criminal procedure on corporal punishment

cards.big: CEDAW Article 5 requires states to eliminate gender-based discriminatory practices
cards.sub: Corporal punishment of women raises both gender equality and torture concerns

cards.big: 2 women caned under Terengganu syariah court for moral offences in September 2024
cards.sub: International outcry followed as video of proceedings circulated online

cards.big: Caning women for moral offences is violence sanctioned by religious authority
Sisters in Islam filed constitutional challenge against Terengganu amendment
